wordplay_note: Pottery forger who helps Taverner obtain false identity papers
card_description: Kathy Nelson is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Flow My Tears the Policeman Said*. Potter and document forger who becomes Taverner's ally in his erased existence. Name note: Pottery forger who helps Taverner obtain false identity papers. The artisan as counterfeiter — authenticity and forgery as parallel acts of creation. First appears in *Flow My Tears the Policeman Said*.
first_work: Flow My Tears the Policeman Said
work_list: Flow My Tears the Policeman Said
